items.name: subix
items.description: Subix is a blazing-fast, hybrid subdomain enumeration engine written in Go. It combines 42 passive OSINT sources with advanced active capabilities like multi-threaded DNS resolution, smart wildcard filtering, recursive scanning, and a permutation engine. Say goodbye to complex CLI chaining—Subix handles the entire discovery pipeline in one run.
